name: mcp-capability-runtime
description: A MCP-compatible capability runtime demo that turns flat tool lists into capability surfaces.

scripts.demo:tax: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js tax --demo
scripts.example:tax: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js tax --input examples/minimal-tool-surface.json
scripts.raw:tax: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js tax --input examples/raw-tool-surface.json
scripts.demo:select: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js select --demo --task "Investigate checkout 500s from the last 30 minutes" --context service=checkout --context timeWindow=30m --context symptom=500
scripts.example:select: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js select --input examples/minimal-tool-surface.json --task "Investigate checkout logs" --context service=checkout --context timeWindow=30m --context symptom=500
scripts.demo:walkthrough: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js demo:walkthrough
